samples.xml_description:
<module id="accu">
    <description>Accumulates 4 input data and outputs the result.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data for addition.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating readiness for new data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating when 4 input data accumulation is reached.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[9:0]">10-bit output data representing the accumulated sum.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Sequential logic block triggered on the rising edge of clk or falling edge of rst_n
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                // Reset condition: Set all registers to zero
                cnt <= 0;
                data_out_reg <= 0;
                valid_out_reg <= 0;
            end else begin
                // Combinational logic based on valid_in and cnt
                case ({valid_in, cnt})
                    2'b00: begin
                        // When valid_in is low and cnt is 0, do nothing
                        cnt <= 0;
                        data_out_reg <= 0;
                        valid_out_reg <= 0;
                    end
                    2'b01: begin
                        // When valid_in is low and cnt is 1, increment cnt
                        cnt <= cnt + 1;
                        data_out_reg <= 0;
                        valid_out_reg <= 0;
                    end
                    2'b10: begin
                        // When valid_in is high and cnt is 0, accumulate data_in
                        cnt <= cnt + 1;
                        data_out_reg <= data_in;
                        valid_out_reg <= 0;
                    end
                    2'b11: begin
                        // When valid_in is high and cnt is 1, accumulate data_in
                        cnt <= cnt + 1;
                        data_out_reg <= data_in + data_out_reg;
                        valid_out_reg <= 0;
                    end
                    2'b12: begin
                        // When valid_in is high and cnt is 2, accumulate data_in
                        cnt <= cnt + 1;
                        data_out_reg <= data_in + data_out_reg;
                        valid_out_reg <= 0;
                    end
                    2'b13: begin
                        // When valid_in is high and cnt is 3, accumulate data_in
                        cnt <= cnt + 1;
                        data_out_reg <= data_in + data_out_reg;
                        valid_out_reg <= 1;
                    end
                    default: begin
                        // Default case: Reset cnt and valid_out_reg
                        cnt <= 0;
                        data_out_reg <= 0;
                        valid_out_reg <= 0;
                    end
                endcase
            end
        end
        // Assigning the output ports to their respective registers
        assign valid_out = valid_out_reg;
        assign data_out = data_out_reg;
    </implementation>
</module>
